---
title: "Forge Staging Boundary"
authoritative_source: "hall_beads"
status: "staging-only"
---

# Forge Staging Boundary

`.agents/forge_staged/` contains staged candidate artifacts and dream proposals.

It is not an operational ledger.
It is not a promotion gate.
It does not authorize execution on its own.

Authoritative promotion flows must go through:

1. the sovereign bead ledger in Hall
2. the canonical forge candidate contract
3. validation and Gungnir/SPRT promotion logic

Treat every file in this directory as a proposal until Corvus Star promotes it through those paths.
